news.t: Think the S&P 500 is too expensive? Check out these ETFs instead.

holdings.infoBox: IUS is an equity ETF with a total of 547 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 7.14%, Apple at 4.64%, Exxon Mobil at 2.46%, Amazon.com at 2.32%, and Intel at 2.16%.

overview.description: The Invesco RAFI Strategic US ETF (IUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Invesco Strategic US index. The fund tracks an index of stocks from large US firms. The index determines firm size by fundamental metrics and also screens by quality metrics IUS was launched on Sep 12, 2018 and is issued by Invesco.

data.title: Think the S&P 500 is too expensive? Check out these ETFs instead.
data.text: Some investors are worried that the stock market is set up for a tech-driven decline.
